Home About What is sports tech Services Ecosystem Contact Join AfricanSTN →

The ecosystem platform for sports technology in Africa

Connecting international innovation with African markets. Compliance services, market intelligence, and industry membership - all in one place.

Get involved Our services
What we do

Three ways we serve the African sports tech ecosystem

Market access

Connecting international sports tech companies with African markets - introductions, partnerships, and distribution across South Africa and the broader continent.

Learn more →

POPIA compliance

Acting as your registered POPIA representative in South Africa - handling regulatory correspondence, maintaining compliance documentation, and keeping you informed of changes.

Learn more →

Market intelligence

African sports tech market research, company directories, and sector analysis for members, partners, and investors navigating the continent.

Learn more →
Services

How AfricanSTN can help

POPIA Representation

If your company collects or processes data from South African users, POPIA requires a local representative. AfricanSTN provides registered representation - enquire for details on what is covered.

Find out more →

Market intelligence & directory

Register to receive AfricanSTN's newsletter and sector intelligence reports. Register your interest in directory inclusion - AfricanSTN curates the directory and will be in touch.

Register interest →
Get involved

Join the African sports technology ecosystem

Whether you are an international sports tech company entering Africa, an African venture looking for visibility, or an organisation that needs POPIA compliance support - AfricanSTN is your starting point.

Register interest About AfricanSTN

We use cookies and local storage to improve your experience. Essential cookies are required for the site to function. Optional cookies help with analytics and remembering your preferences. Learn more
